name: Patient 44
history: History of recurring conflicts and strained relationships. Trust and boundary issues. Some relationships involve alcoholism. History of aggressive behavior.
helpless_belief: I am trapped in destructive patterns
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: I deserve to be treated poorly because of my own flaws.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm destined for chaotic, painful relationships.
situation: Considering reconnecting with estranged person who previously caused harm. Deciding not to reconnect as self-protective choice.
auto_thought: "I miss them, but I'll just get hurt again. I can't trust myself to set boundaries."
behavior: Writes but doesn't send message, tells friends about decision for accountability, feels both relieved and lonely.
